action.reasoning: Observation: Best safe_follow_steps=90.5 (iter 14 PD), current=56.6 (simple proportional). Main bottleneck: robot can't track moving human well enough. Analysis: Adding angle rate damping (smoothed) helps both damp oscillation AND anticipate human movement. Higher forward bias (0.2 vs 0.1) and distance rate gain (0.8 vs 0.5) help follow moving human. Target dist=1.5m (center of safe zone) gives most margin. Decision: Write improved PD controller with smoothed angle_rate, higher forward bias, submit eval immediately as last iteration.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output out.json
